title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Aptech South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Aptech South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Aptech South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
